def count_Num(n):
    count = 0
    for bit in range(8):
        if (n & (1 << bit)) != 0:
            count +=1
    for bit in range(1, n):
        if (n & (1 << bit)) != 0:
            count +=1
    return count

def count_Num(n):
    count = 0
    # Check all bits from 0 to 8 (0-based)
    for i in range(8):
        if (n >> i) & 1:
            count +=1
    # Check bits from 1 to n-1 (1-based)
    for i in range(1, n):
        if (n >> i) & 1:
            count +=1
    return count
